chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَى أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ الصَّادِقِ صَلَوَاتُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِمَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 70 – The Indication and the wordings upon Abu Abdullah Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> Bin Muhammad Al-Sadiq<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (327/ 3)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (327/ 3)
text: كُنْتُ عِنْدَ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) فَأَقْبَلَ جَعْفَرٌ ( عليه السلام ) فَقَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) هَذَا خَيْرُ الْبَرِيَّةِ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Khalid, from one of our companions, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub, from Tahir who said,

‘I was in the presence of Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, so he<sup>asws</sup> kissed Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, and Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘This one<sup>asws</sup> is the best of the Created beings’.
en.sarwar: 5.Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from Muhammad ibn Khalid from some of our people from Yunus ibn Ya‘qub from Tahir who has said the following. “Once I was in the presence of abu Ja‘far (a.s.) when Ja‘far (a.s.) came. Abu Ja‘far (a.s.) said, “This (Ja‘far ) is the best of the people.”
